author_recipe_tested: FFHQ five-point alignment; StyleGAN2/e4e inversion; four deterministic password candidates; inverse warp
project_adaptation: landmark alignment; colour matching; feathered blending
evidence_boundary: Alignment and blending improved placement but did not preserve pose/expression consistently; multi-face coverage was incomplete

author_recipe_tested: 512-pixel unaligned multi-face recipe; 25 denoising steps; anonymisation degree sweep 1.20/1.25/1.40; separate 200-step author-sample control
project_adaptation: reviewed boxes used to cover every target face
evidence_boundary: The original Stability AI model identifier was inaccessible; the obtainable SD2.1 mirror produced severe corruption on CASTLE and on the author-supplied sample

author_recipe_tested: 100 inversion/denoising steps; skip 70%; guidance 10; aligned localized face mask retaining eyes and mouth
evidence_boundary: Large/edge/multi-face outputs contained malformed geometry while profile/small cases retained weak identity change; multi-face coverage was incomplete

author_recipe_tested: FFHQ alignment; StyleGAN latent-channel replacement at author-selected layers 5/7/9/11; inverse warp
project_adaptation: reviewed boxes; tone matching; feathered compositing
evidence_boundary: Pasted-face appearance and pose/scale mismatch persisted; multi-face coverage was incomplete

author_recipe_tested: inpainting baseline at 25 steps; guidance reduced from 7.0 to 4.5; no mask expansion; 8-pixel feather; 0.9 crop padding
project_adaptation: reviewed face boxes and complete multi-face processing
evidence_boundary: Tuning removed mask-like seams but larger/profile faces changed facial geometry and small/multi-face privacy remained uncertain

author_recipe_tested: SDXL conditional inversion; 100 steps; skip 0.7; identity scale 1; author guidance -10 plus -5/-7.5 sensitivity sweep
project_adaptation: reviewed boxes used after the author detector failed four of five stress cases
evidence_boundary: Four outputs were plausible but altered appearance/expression; the multi-face frame failed at every guidance value and small/edge privacy was weak

author_recipe_tested: official 60000-reference FaRL nearest-neighbour pool; W+ optimization; 50 epochs; identity margin 0.5; identity/attribute weights 10/0.1
project_adaptation: five hard cases selected from the completed canonical 500-frame run
evidence_boundary: The exact full-pool outputs changed expression/geometry and produced severe edge/multi-face artifacts; canonical full-run mean runtime is 16.623 seconds/frame
